changes.description: New QuickViewModal component — Chakra modal that fetches full product data via useProductViewModal hook and renders ProductView with loading spinner and error states
14 unit tests for QuickViewModal covering loading, loaded, error, accessibility, close behavior, and ProductView prop forwarding
ProductTile override wrapping base tile with hover-reveal Quick View overlay bar at bottom of product image; hides for sets/bundles
12 unit tests for ProductTile override covering overlay bar rendering, exclusion rules, click behavior, event propagation, and accessibility
Storefront smoke E2E tests with browser diagnostics — homepage, PLP navigation, PDP product info verification
Feature specification with architecture discoveries, UI/UX design, component contracts, and implementation plan
